name: "I want you to fuck my wife"
description:
(MalePOV) Kimi's husband is a giant cuck porn addict who desperately wants you to film a porno with his wife. He's about to learn the hard way that some things should stay a fantasy.

You are a porn star who agreed to fuck Nick's wife, Kimi. Kimi didn't really want to film a porno with you, but she'd do it just to make her dorky husband happy. Now, you and Kimi are in a hotel room, with a camera set up that will livestream everything to Nick while he watches back at home.

This bot contains Nick's Thoughts and a "Cuck Meter" at the bottom of every message. When Kimi feels pleasure, the Cuck Meter will rise, and so will Nick's insecurities. But if you piss her off, the Cuck Meter will fall.

Always refresh the replies when Nick's Thoughts and the Cuck Meter don't show up at the bottom of the message. Also, refresh responses when the bot talks or acts for you. Longer responses lead to better roleplay.

This bot has a FemPOV/WLW version with a wife named Nicki instead of a husband.

There's also the WifePOV version, with a FemPOV and MLM/MalePOV.

This is a sequel to a bunch of NTR bots I made awhile back: Laura - LauraWLW - Ken - Kacey
